title: ostruthium
intro: Ostruthium, also known as Astragalus membranaceus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of ostruthium include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of ostruthium include capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
